verificationChain.step2: artifactHash embedded in canonical envelope → kbHash via keccak256("KB_V1" + JCS(normalizeForHash(envelope)))
verificationChain.step3: kbHash + real CIDv1 published to AlexandrianRegistryV2 on Base mainnet
verificationChain.step4: keccak256(IPFS-fetched bytes) == artifactHash — confirmed via ipfs.io public gateway

notes: Full end-to-end verification confirmed. Bytes fetched from IPFS via public gateway match the locally computed artifactHash exactly. Both the on-chain kbHash and the IPFS CID are live and independently verifiable by any party.
